title: Incorrect constant detection for an array of interfaces
body:
---


Author Name: **Todd Strader** (@toddstrader)
Original Redmine Issue: 822 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-09-19


---

Using a generate loop, I am trying to use one of an array of interfaces as both a RHS and LHS operator.  Verilator complains that the index is non-constant even though it is a genvar.

I've poked around in the code some, but haven't gotten my head around it yet.  If anyone is interested in giving me some pointers on this, I'm certainly interested in going back in there.

```
$ verilator -Wall --cc intf_test.sv 
%Warning-DECLFILENAME: intf_test.sv:1: Filename 'intf_test' does not match IFACE name: foo
%Warning-DECLFILENAME: Use "/* verilator lint_off DECLFILENAME */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Error: intf_test.sv:34: Unsupported: Non-constant inside []'s in the cell part of a dotted reference
%Error: intf_test.sv:37: Unsupported: Non-constant inside []'s in the cell part of a dotted reference
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s), 1 warning(s)
%Error: Command Failed /usr/local/bin/verilator_bin -Wall --cc intf_test.sv

```
